subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Verily, Thy servant 'Alí-Muḥammad is in need of Thy forgiveness, pardon and aid, and I press my forehead (in supplication) [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک علی محمد یحتاج العفو و الصفح و المدد و انی اعفر جبینی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell
